task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "打开微信中的目标文章"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "点击右上角的三个点以访问分享选项"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "查找并使用“复制链接”功能"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "通过分享到浏览器获取URL（如果直接链接不可用）"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "初始化Selenium WebDriver"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "加载目标文章URL"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "等待页面动态内容加载完成"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "定位标题元素并提取文本"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "定位正文内容元素并提取文本"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "关闭WebDriver"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "解析文章内容容器的所有子元素"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "识别HTML标题标签(h1-h6)并记录层级"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "将标题和内容分组为结构化数据"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "生成合法的文件名以保存文章"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "将结构化内容写入本地文件"}, {"id": "Node16", "description": "返回文件保存路径"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "accessOptions"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "findCopyLinkOption"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "fallbackToBrowser"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "initializeDriver"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "waitForContentLoad"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "extractTitle"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "extractContent"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node11", "type": "parseArticleStructure"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "identifyHeadingTags"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "groupContentByHeadings"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "generateFileName"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "writeToFile"}, {"source": "Node15", "target": "Node16", "type": "returnFilePath"}, {"source": "Node16", "target": "Node10", "type": "closeDriver"}]}
